title: Generator Output
description: Schema for the Generator's materialized SKILL.md revision output per iteration.

source_version.description: The skill version that was diagnosed (input to this Generator run).

target_version.description: The new skill version produced by this Generator run.

skill_content.description: The complete revised SKILL.md as a single string, ready to write to disk. Must include valid YAML frontmatter and all sections.

changelog.description: One-line summary of what changed in this revision and why.

preserved_sections.description: List of section names that were kept unchanged from the source version.

modified_sections.description: List of section names that were added, rewritten, or materially modified.
